summary:
The provided information indicates there is no evidence supporting the use of valproic acid to improve survival in patients with diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma (DIPG), as all available data show ineffective chemotherapy options without demonstrated efficacy. Valproic acid’s reported benefits relate solely to an off-topic study in biliary tract cancer and are not applicable to DIPG. 

Based on these findings, we conclude that adding valproic acid does not improve survival in DIPG.

The answer is \boxed{B}.
